evals.prompt: I need curl commands for Directus REST API — how do I list, create, and update items?
evals.expected_output: Curl examples for GET/POST/PATCH /items/{collection} with auth
expectations: Shows query parameters (fields, filter, sort, limit)

evals.prompt: How do I do schema migrations between Directus environments?
evals.expected_output: 3-step pipeline: snapshot, diff, apply with curl examples
expectations: Includes curl command examples with auth headers
